model._hint: Transformer: unsloth/Z-Image-Turbo-GGUF (z-image-turbo-Q8_0.gguf, ~7.22 GB). Pipeline components (VAE, text encoder, scheduler, tokenizer): Tongyi-MAI/Z-Image-Turbo. Q8_0 keeps near-bfloat16 quality. sequential_cpu_offload disabled (incompatible with GGUF). Fits comfortably in 16 GB unified memory without offloading (vs ~12.3 GB bfloat16 which required cpu_offload).

generation._hint: 9 steps = 8 DiT forwards per model card. Range: 8–16 practical. 9 is the sweet spot. | CRITICAL: guidance_scale MUST be 0.0 — CFG is baked in via distillation. Any positive value degrades quality. | 1024×1024 native. Arbitrary resolutions up to ~1 MP (e.g. 1152×896 landscape, 896×1152 portrait).

system._hint: ~7.22 GB peak (Q8_0 GGUF); sequential_cpu_offload: disabled (incompatible with GGUF). Previously required cpu_offload at ~12.3 GB bfloat16 — GGUF eliminates that need.

notes.about: Generates high-quality photorealistic images in 8 steps using Z-Image-Turbo — a 6B parameter single-stream DiT distilled via Decoupled-DMD + DMDR reinforcement learning. Uses GGUF Q8_0 quantisation (~7.22 GB) for efficient 16 GB inference without cpu_offload. Supports bilingual prompts (English and Chinese).
notes.prompt_guide:
No trigger word. Supports English and Chinese prompts. Examples: 'a photorealistic portrait of a woman in soft evening light', 'a futuristic cityscape at night with glowing neon signs', 'a serene mountain lake at sunrise, ultra-detailed, 8k'.

Negative prompt: Negative prompts are supported. Example: 'blurry, low quality, artifacts, distorted, watermark'.
